message.content:
The background is a **clinical near-black (neutral, not warm/brown)**—it leans toward a dark, cool-toned black with subtle brownish undertones, but the dominant impression is neutral and clinical rather than warm/brown.  

The accent is a **single traffic-cone orange**—the flowing lines and text accents use a consistent, vibrant orange (similar to a traffic cone’s hue) without additional competing accent colors.  

The feel leans **industrial** (due to the sleek, dynamic, almost mechanical flow of the orange lines) rather than artisanal (which would suggest handcrafted, organic textures).  

Readability is **good**—text (e.g., “Hi, I’m John Shannon,” navigation, and “FULL-STACK WEB DEVELOPER”) uses sufficient contrast against the dark background, with the orange accent helping to draw attention to key elements without overwhelming legibility.
